description_long: This is a large, menacing hammer with a robust, industrial design, featuring a double-sided rectangular head adorned with prominent spikes and metallic bolts. The head is connected to a thick, cylindrical handle that is reinforced with metal bands and a spiked mace-like section near the top. The handle is dark, textured, and capped with a grip that appears to be wrapped or molded for secure handling. A heavy chain is attached to the lower part of the handle, adding both visual weight and a potential secondary function. The overall color palette is dominated by dark metallic grays, blacks, and hints of rust or bronze, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. This hammer would be visually striking in an urban setting, such as a themed park, a movie set, or as a prop in a garage or industrial area.
description: A large, spiked, double-sided hammer with a dark, reinforced handle and a heavy chain attached, featuring a rugged, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the spiked, double-sided hammer head and the central handle with the chain hanging to the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the hammer head, the alignment of the spikes, and the cylindrical handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite face of the hammer head and the chain's position relative to the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other profile of the hammer head, emphasizing the symmetry and the spiked features.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a dark, textured, and possibly rubberized grip, reinforced with metal bands and a spiked section near the top.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided rectangular sledge-type head with large, prominent spikes and metallic bolts on both striking faces.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Heavy metal chain attached to the lower part of the handle
